details.address: 378 Technology Center Way Center, Rock Hill, SC 29730

raw_data.address: 378 Technology Center Way Center, Rock Hill, SC 29730
raw_data.name: Most Fly Coffee Company

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Ahren! Hope to see you again soon!!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious drinks and super friendly service. Thanks for a great morning!

As someone who doesn't get to treat myself to coffee as much as I'd like, I have been very pleased with what this unique shop has to offer! I've tried the Filipino sweet tea, Vietnamese coffee, and the golden milk. All three were very unique but addicting flavors! I think the affordable prices and unique flavors make this a stand out location in Rock Hill. If you love coffee or trying unique drinks, you've got to try Most Dope!

Staff is also very friendly and helpful. Because the signature drinks are not always things you may know about, staff is more than happy to answer questions, and can even help compare drinks to something you have had before, as a basis of reference.

Can't recommend enough! My only regret is my coffee budget isn't big enough to come by more often!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Alissa rocks! Thanks for visiting us!!
reviews_data.review_text: Coffee was amazing and service was great! Allissa is so hardworking and very friendly! I highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We’re sorry parking caused frustration during your visit. While parking is not managed by our business, there is a free parking deck directly next to the residential section for customer use. Since you were unable to try our drinks or service, we’d still love the opportunity to welcome you in and provide the experience our customers know us for.
reviews_data.review_text:
There was absolutely no parking available at this location. ALL parking is for residents.
I left, though found another nearby coffee shop to visit.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the support! Hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: There are a lot of neat little spots within this industrial building. They have some nice couches and there’s a great joint for breakfast right beside it, as well as a Jamaican food place. The ube latte (purple) was definitely better with the vanilla cream cold foam topping I asked for (not terribly sweet but sweet enough) & the green drink was good too!  They had some honey buns and cookies made with these flavors, too, which was pretty cool, unique, and beautiful! (Food was from the neighboring coffee/chai tea/brunch & lunch joint called Mug & Maple).

Best coffee shop in Rock Hill, hands down. Discovered them because of Red Wolf MMA next door and I have been hooked ever since. The atmosphere is so chill and positive, and the lounge seating is super comfortable. Mike and Wayne are the Dopest coaches and owners, always having a great time. Flavor-wise, you cannot go wrong. The Filipino iced coffee and Lucky Charms and the sweet tea drinks are amazing, and the ube and pandan cookies are a must try. Different from the menu to the vibes. Visit and you wont regret it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy you came in!
reviews_data.review_text: Tried the pandan latte today, super yummy!! It had the best nutty/sweet flavor and was a fun green color. Gerald is an awesome barista and all around guy! He answered all our questions and was fun to talk with. Will be back soon to try more Filipino drinks!
Dope spot, Dope coffee!

reviews_data.owner_answer: The cheese!
reviews_data.review_text:
Awesome new coffee spot with a super chill lofi hip hop vibe. The artwork featuring MF DOOM enjoying coffee gives the place a really unique and creative feel.
The coffee is smooth and high quality, and I love that they offer Filipino items on the menu—it adds something different you don’t see everywhere else. The Vietnamese coffee is amazing as well.
Friendly service and a laid-back atmosphere make it a great place to hang out or just relax. Definitely worth checking out!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much Ben! Looking forward to seeing you again✌️
reviews_data.review_text: Great staff and great drinks. The variety they off is great because it brings in different parts of the world. Definitely recommend coming here

reviews_data.owner_answer: Great choice with that tea! Thanks for the support🫵
reviews_data.review_text: I am so happy that I found this coffee shop - the coffee is delicious, but the Philippine Tea is to die for!!!!  Not to mention Mike and Wayne are super nice and friendly!  You definitely will not regret visiting.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We all have been stoked about the CB too😆. Thanks for hanging out!
reviews_data.review_text: Great folks, unique drinks, and EXCELLENT cold brew.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for checking us out man!!🫵🐐
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious coffee and great company.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy you came! Great meeting you today!
reviews_data.review_text: I ordered the caramel iced latte with the peanut butter protein cold foam on top… And yes, it was SO GOOD! I took the idea from the reviewer below me! Not only that, but the price was amazing to the point where I left a tip because I was expecting to pay more. Reviews don’t lie! You definitely have to try it out. The owners are also very kind!
Love this spot! Unique flavors and great staff.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy you came in!
reviews_data.review_text: I bought a caramel iced latte with peanut butter protein topper....so GOOD! I even had a cinnamon roll that I couldn't resist. This coffee is a hidden gem inside the power house. Even the power house has really stepped it up in design and furniture!!! Will 110% be back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed it come back soon!
reviews_data.review_text: They were so kind me and my friends got multiple different types of coffee and they were all super delicious. It’s a little hard to find tucked away in the powerhouse but it’s well worth it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy to have yall as neighbors!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious coffee and the best owners!! Never tried a Vietnamese coffee until I tried Most Dope and now I LOVE them!! Definitely a recommended spot here in town!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for stopping by, Mandee!! We can’t wait to see you next time🫵✌️
reviews_data.review_text: My new favorite coffee shop! The owners are so friendly and welcoming, the coffee is also soo good!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Sarah!✌️
reviews_data.review_text: Loved the coffee!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: You Rock! Thanks for hanging out💪
reviews_data.review_text: The most amazing coffee, customer service, and atmosphere. The workers are super friendly and incredibly kind. Perfect place to hangout, study, etc.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Apologies to all grandmas out there, yall are welcome ❤️✋. Stoked to hear you enjoyed the coffee Kyle!!! Thanks for the review
reviews_data.review_text: Not your Grandma’s coffee shop! They pull excellent shots of espresso and their cold brew is top-notch. Their specialty coffees are all unique and delicious, flavors you won’t find anywhere else!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Will, you’re the man🫵🫵. Come back when I’m on shift (and find out which one am “I” tho 👀)
reviews_data.review_text: Incredible coffee and even better people!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Jeffrey!! Thanks so much for the review, stoked you’ve been coming by. Hopefully some of that good-idea-potential hits you up next time you’re in!🐐
reviews_data.review_text:
The coffee is dangerously good, the kind where you take one sip and immediately question every mediocre cup you’ve ever had before.

The baristas are awesome, the atmosphere is laid-back, and the whole place just feels like the type of spot where good ideas happen.

If you need caffeine, good vibes, or a place to pretend you’re being productive on your laptop for 3 hours, this is it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Best review in Google🤘✌️🫵🐐🙏
reviews_data.review_text: Best coffee place in Rock Hill, Fort Mill and charlotte.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Much appreciated, Levi. Thanks for stopping by and trying us out! 

See u on the mats🫵🥋
reviews_data.review_text: It’s a vibe! Great culture creating a safe place for all types of people including families to come chill and enjoy sourced grinds that represent who they are as a company! Go check them out and get the dope experience for yourself!

reviews_data.owner_answer: So happy to hear you like the drinks.!
reviews_data.review_text: First time trying filipino coffee and let me tell y’all…. IT IS STRONG AND TASTY! The staff is super friendly and literally DOPE. I truly enjoyed sitting at their lobby area. It’s a very quiet environment where you could sit and read a book or even get some work done. The owners also own the Red Wolf MMA gym right next to it. Definitely gained a new customer and would recommend everyone to go by and give them a try ASAP!! You will not regret it ✨

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you, so happy to provide some unique coffee flavors to the Rock Hill Community
reviews_data.review_text: Lovvvve this place! Excellent coffee, excellent owners, excellent service! I will definitely be coming here weekly!
